---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---
```{r}

```


```{r}
# 加载所需包
library(readxl)
library(meta)
library(dmetar)
rm(list = ls())
# Excel 文件路径（需替换为你的实际文件路径）
excel_file <- "D:/meta分析/9.1network meta/12.31/整合版数据1.3_TTD.xlsx"  

# 获取 Excel 中所有 sheet 的名称
sheet_names <- excel_sheets(excel_file)  

library(readxl)
library(meta)

# ---------- 关键新增：创建空列表用于存储每个sheet的mg ----------
mg_list <- list()  # 命名列表，键=sheet名，值=对应的mg对象

# ---------- 0) 结果输出目录：若不存在就创建 ----------
dir.create("forest_plots", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("forest_plots/subgroup", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("funnel_plots", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("sensitivity_forest_plots", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("leave_one_out_plots", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ---------- 1) 主循环 ----------
for (sheet in sheet_names) {
  
  cat("==== Processing sheet:", sheet, "====\n")
  
  # ---- 1.1 读数据（用 tryCatch 防止单个 sheet 报错终止整个循环）----
  dat <- tryCatch(
    read_excel(excel_file, sheet = sheet),
    error = function(e) {
      cat("❌ 读取失败：", sheet, " -> ", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
      return(NULL)
    }
  )
  if (is.null(dat)) next
  
  # ---- 1.2 基础列检查（缺关键列就跳过）----
  required_cols <- c("HR", "LCI", "UCI", "control_type", "treatment_type1", "Trial.name","treatment_type","masked")
  miss_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, colnames(dat))
  if (length(miss_cols) > 0) {
    cat("⚠️ 跳过：", sheet, "缺少列：", paste(miss_cols, collapse = ", "), "\n")
    next
  }
  
  # ---- 1.3 数值化（HR/LCI/UCI）----
  dat$HR  <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dat$HR))
  dat$LCI <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dat$LCI))
  dat$UCI <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dat$UCI))
  
  # ---- 1.4 研究筛选：对照=CT 且 treatment_type1 不缺失 ----
  sub <- subset(dat, control_type == "CT" & !is.na(treatment_type1))
  
  # ---- 1.5 若 HR 缺失但有 logHR & SE(logHR)，则反推 HR/CI ----
  # 注意：列名里带括号必须用反引号 `SE(logHR)`
  has_log_cols <- all(c("logHR", "SE(logHR)") %in% colnames(sub))
  if (has_log_cols) {
    idx_need <- is.na(sub$HR) & !is.na(sub$logHR) & !is.na(sub$`SE(logHR)`)
    if (any(idx_need)) {
      sub$HR[idx_need]  <- exp(sub$logHR[idx_need])
      sub$LCI[idx_need] <- exp(sub$logHR[idx_need] - 1.96 * sub$`SE(logHR)`[idx_need])
      sub$UCI[idx_need] <- exp(sub$logHR[idx_need] + 1.96 * sub$`SE(logHR)`[idx_need])
    }
  }
  
  # ---- 1.6 过滤有效行：HR/LCI/UCI 必须齐全且 >0 ----
  sub <- sub[complete.cases(sub$HR, sub$LCI, sub$UCI), ]
  sub <- sub[sub$HR > 0 & sub$LCI > 0 & sub$UCI > 0, ]
  
  if (nrow(sub) == 0) {
    cat("⚠️ 警告：", sheet, "过滤后无有效数据\n")
    next
  }
  
  # ---- 1.7 构造 TE 与 seTE（推荐显式给 seTE，最稳）----
  # TE = log(HR)
  # seTE ≈ (log(UCI)-log(LCI)) / (2*1.96)
  sub$TE   <- log(sub$HR)
  sub$seTE <- (log(sub$UCI) - log(sub$LCI)) / (2 * 1.96)
  
  # seTE 必须为正且非缺失
  sub <- sub[is.finite(sub$TE) & is.finite(sub$seTE) & sub$seTE > 0, ]
  if (nrow(sub) == 0) {
    cat("⚠️ 警告：", sheet, "无法计算有效 seTE（可能CI不合理）\n")
    next
  }
  
  # ---- 1.8 Meta 分析 ----
  mg <- tryCatch(
    meta::metagen(
      TE = TE,
      seTE = seTE,
      studlab = `Trial.name`,
      sm = "HR",
      n.e = N_E,
      n.c  = N_C,
      method.tau = "DL",
      hakn = T,
      prediction = F,
      data = sub
    ),
    error = function(e) {
      cat("❌ metagen 失败：", sheet, " -> ", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
      return(NULL)
    }
  )
  if (is.null(mg)) next
  
  # ---------- 关键新增：将当前sheet的mg存入列表 ----------
  mg_list[[sheet]] <- mg  # 按sheet名称命名列表元素，避免覆盖
  
  # =========================
  # 2) Forest plot
  # =========================
  plot_filename <- paste0("forest_plots/forest_plot_", gsub(" ", "_", sheet), ".pdf")
  pdf(plot_filename, width = 12, height = 8)
  p_val <- round(mg$pval.random, 4)
  p_val_formatted <- ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "<0.001", paste("=", round(p_val, 4)))
  meta::forest(
    mg,
    xlab = "Hazard Ratio (HR)",
    leftcols = c("studlab", "n.e", "n.c"),
    leftlabs = c("Study", "Experimental\n(N)", "Control\n(N)"),
    print.tau2 = TRUE,
    # layout = "JAMA",
    main = paste("Forest Plot for Outcome:", sheet),
    label.right = "Higher risk\nof deterioration",
    label.left  = "Lower risk\nof deterioration",
    # 核心：自定义汇总行标签，加入p值
    summarylab = paste("Overall (p", p_val, ")", sep = ""),
    # 可选：调整汇总行字体加粗
    fontsize.summary = 12,
    fontface.summary = "bold"
  )
  dev.off()
  
  # =========================
  # 3) Funnel plot + Egger（稳健版，不会再报 text length 0）
  # =========================
  funnel_filename <- paste0("funnel_plots/funnel_plot_", gsub(" ", "_", sheet), ".pdf")
  pdf(funnel_filename, width = 12, height = 8)
  
  meta::funnel(mg, main = paste("Funnel Plot for Outcome:", sheet))
  
  k <- mg$k
  egger_text <- NULL
  
  if (!is.null(k) && is.finite(k) && k >= 10) {
    eg <- tryCatch(
      meta::metabias(mg, method.bias = "linreg"),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    
    pval <- NA_real_
    if (!is.null(eg)) {
      if (!is.null(eg$p.value) && length(eg$p.value) == 1) pval <- eg$p.value
      if (is.na(pval) && !is.null(eg$p.value.bias) && length(eg$p.value.bias) == 1) pval <- eg$p.value.bias
      if (is.na(pval) && !is.null(eg$bias$p.value) && length(eg$bias$p.value) == 1) pval <- eg$bias$p.value
    }
    
    if (is.finite(pval)) {
      egger_text <- sprintf("Egger regression test (linreg): p = %.3g (k = %d)", pval, k)
    } else {
      egger_text <- sprintf("Egger regression test (linreg): p not available (k = %d)", k)
    }
  } else {
    egger_text <- sprintf(
      "Egger regression test not performed (k = %s; recommended only when k \u2265 10)",
      ifelse(is.null(k), "NA", as.character(k))
    )
  }
  
  mtext(egger_text, side = 3, line = 0.5, adj = 1, cex = 0.9)
  dev.off()
  
  # =========================
  # 4) Leave-one-out / influence（稳健：不让缺包中断）
  # =========================
  
  # 4.1 metainf（meta 包自带）
  sensitivity_filename <- paste0("sensitivity_forest_plots/sensitivity_forest_plot_", gsub(" ", "_", sheet), ".pdf")
  pdf(sensitivity_filename, width = 12, height = 8)
  
  mi <- tryCatch(meta::metainf(mg, pooled = "random"), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (!is.null(mi)) {
    meta::forest(
      mi,
      comb.fixed = FALSE,
      main = paste("Leave-one-out sensitivity (metainf):", sheet),
      layout = "JAMA",
      cex = 0.6
    )
  } else {
    plot.new()
    text(0.5, 0.5, "metainf failed / not available for this outcome", cex = 1)
  }
  dev.off()
  
  # 4.2 InfluenceAnalysis（常见来自 dmetar；可能你环境里没有）
  # 如果没有该函数，就跳过，不报错
  if (exists("InfluenceAnalysis")) {
    m.gen.inf <- tryCatch(InfluenceAnalysis(mg, random = TRUE), error = function(e) NULL)
    
    leave_one_out_filename <- paste0("leave_one_out_plots/leave_one_out_plot_", gsub(" ", "_", sheet), ".pdf")
    pdf(leave_one_out_filename, width = 12, height = 8)
    
    if (!is.null(m.gen.inf)) {
      par(mar = c(4, 4, 2, 2))
      plot(m.gen.inf, "i2")
    } else {
      plot.new()
      text(0.5, 0.5, "InfluenceAnalysis failed for this outcome", cex = 1)
    }
    dev.off()
  } else {
    cat("ℹ️ InfluenceAnalysis() 未找到（可能未安装/未加载 dmetar），跳过 leave_one_out i2 图：", sheet, "\n")
  }
  
  # =========================
  # 5) 亚组分析：byvar = treatment_type（若 treatment_type 列存在才做）
  # =========================
  if ("masked" %in% colnames(sub)) {
    
    mg_sub <- tryCatch(
      meta::metagen(
        TE = TE,
        seTE = seTE,
        studlab = `Trial.name`,
        sm = "HR",
        n.e = N_E,
        n.c  = N_C,
        method.tau = "DL",
        hakn = T,
        byvar = masked,
        data = sub
      ),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    
    if (!is.null(mg_sub)) {
      plot_filename2 <- paste0("forest_plots/subgroup/forest_", gsub(" ", "_", sheet), "_masked.pdf")
      pdf(plot_filename2, width = 12, height = 8)
      
      meta::forest(
        mg_sub,
        xlab = "Hazard Ratio (HR)",
        leftcols = c("studlab", "n.e", "n.c"),
        leftlabs = c("Study", "Experimental\n(N)", "Control\n(N)"),
        print.tau2 = TRUE,
        #layout = "JAMA",
        print.byvar = TRUE,
        overall = TRUE,
        main = paste(sheet, "- Subgroup analysis: masked"),
        label.right = "Higher risk\nof deterioration",
        label.left  = "Lower risk\nof deterioration"
      )
      dev.off()
    } else {
      cat("⚠️ 亚组分析失败（masked）：", sheet, "\n")
    }
    
  } else {
    cat("p：", p_val, "\n")
  }
  
  cat("p", p_val_formatted,":", sheet, "\n\n")
}

# ---------- 关键新增：保存mg_list到文件（可选但推荐） ----------
# 方式1：保存为RData（可存多个对象，加载后直接调用mg_list）
save(mg_list, file = "meta_analysis_mg_objects.RData")

# 方式2：保存为RDS（单个对象，更轻量）
saveRDS(mg_list, file = "meta_analysis_mg_objects.rds")

cat("✅ 所有有效sheet的mg已存入mg_list列表，并保存为RData/RDS文件！\n")

```

```{r}
find.outliers(mg)
library(dplyr)
m.gen.inf <- InfluenceAnalysis(mg, random =TRUE)
summary(m.gen.inf)
plot(m.gen.inf,"baujat")
plot(m.gen.inf,"influence")
update(mg, exclude = 6) %>% summary()
summary(mg)



update(mg, subgroup = sub$ROB, tau.common = TRUE)
eggers.test(mg)

metabias(mg, method.bias = "Pustejovsky",k.min = 5)
```

#循环跑 univariable metareg + 汇总结果
```{r}
regression_data<-read_excel("D:/meta分析/9.1network meta/2025.12.25/meta regression data.xlsx")
mg1<-mg_list$
mg1$data<-merge(mg1$data,regression_data,by="Study.ID")
m.gen.reg <- metareg(mg1, ~treatment_type)

library(meta)
library(dplyr)


vars <- c(
  "Age_ICI_Median", "Female", "Male",
  "Asia", "Sq", "Non_sq",
  "Ne_PD_L1", "High_PD_L1",
  "ECOG_0", "ECOG_2",
  "Brain metastasis", "Never smoking"
)

res <- vector("list", length(vars))
names(res) <- vars

# 安全取值：NULL 或长度0 -> NA
get1 <- function(x) if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0) NA_real_ else x[1]

for (v in vars) {
  fml <- as.formula(paste0("~ `", v, "`"))
  
  fit <- tryCatch(metareg(mg, fml), error = function(e) e)
  
  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    res[[v]] <- data.frame(
      moderator = v,
      k = NA_integer_,
      beta = NA_real_,
      se = NA_real_,
      p = NA_real_,
      I2 = NA_real_,
      error = fit$message,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    next
  }
  
  # 有些变量会导致“只有截距没有协变量系数”
  # metareg 对象里通常系数在 beta/se 或 coeffs 这类字段；最稳的方式是先看 pval 是否有第2个
  p2 <- if (!is.null(fit$pval) && length(fit$pval) >= 2) fit$pval[2] else NA_real_
  
  # beta/se 的位置在不同版本略有差异：优先用 fit$beta / fit$se
  b2  <- if (!is.null(fit$beta) && length(fit$beta) >= 2) fit$beta[2] else NA_real_
  se2 <- if (!is.null(fit$se)   && length(fit$se)   >= 2) fit$se[2]   else NA_real_
  
  # 研究数 k：常见字段是 k 或 k.w / k.all（不同版本不同），这里做兜底
  k_used <- get1(fit$k)
  if (is.na(k_used)) k_used <- get1(fit$k.w)
  if (is.na(k_used)) k_used <- get1(fit$k.all)
  
  res[[v]] <- data.frame(
    moderator = v,
    k = as.integer(k_used),
    beta = b2,
    se = se2,
    p = p2,
    I2 = get1(fit$I2),
    error = ifelse(is.na(p2) && is.na(b2) && is.na(se2),
                   "No slope estimated (moderator constant or missing).",
                   NA_character_),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

res_tab <- do.call(rbind, res)

# 多重比较校正（你要的“调整后的p值”）
res_tab$p_adj_FDR <- p.adjust(res_tab$p, method = "BH")            # 推荐
# 如需 Bonferroni 也可以加一列：
res_tab$p_adj_Bonf <- p.adjust(res_tab$p, method = "bonferroni")

# 保存
write.csv(res_tab, "univariable_metareg_results_with_fatigue.csv", row.names = FALSE)

res_tab


```

```{r}
# 方法1：直接指定镜像地址（推荐清华镜像）
options(repos = c(
  CRAN="https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/CRAN/",  # 清华CRAN镜像
  Bioconductor="https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/bioconductor/"  # 清华Bioconductor镜像（如需）
))

study_data_sorted <- sub %>% arrange(Year)
# 进行累积Meta分析
cumulative_meta <- metacum(mg,
             sortvar = study_data_sorted$Year,
             pooled ="random") # 使用随机效应模型

# 查看结果
summary(cumulative_meta)

# 绘制累积森林图
library(meta)

# 注意：TSA需要安装额外的包
if(!require(tsaR)) install.packages("tsaR")
library(tsaR)

# 提取效应量和标准误
effects <- cumulative_meta$TE
se <- cumulative_meta$seTE
n_cum <- cumulative_meta$n.e + cumulative_meta$n.c

# 进行试验序贯分析
tsa_result <- tsa(effects, se, n_cum,
        alpha =0.05, # 显著性水平
        beta =0.2,  # 检验效能为80%
        delta = -3,  # 临床相关的效应量
        method ="OBF")# O'Brien-Fleming边界

# 绘制TSA图
plot(tsa_result, main ="降压药物效果的试验序贯分析")
```


```{r}
qol<-mg_list$QoL$data
# 1) Pearson相关（对应文中“correlation between HRs of PFS and OS”）
cor_test <- cor.test(qol$HR, qol$HR.OS, method = "pearson")
cor_test

# 1) 反推SE(logHR)
dat2 <- qol %>%
  mutate(
    logHR_PFS = log(HR),
    se_PFS    = (log(UCI) - log(LCI)) / (2*1.96),
    logHR_OS  = log(HR.OS),
    se_OS     = (log(UCI.OS) - log(LCI.OS)) / (2*1.96)
  )

# 2) 计算log(rHR)与SE
dat2 <- dat2 %>%
  mutate(
    log_rHR = logHR_PFS - logHR_OS,
    se_rHR  = sqrt(se_PFS^2 + se_OS^2),
    rHR     = exp(log_rHR),
    rHR_LCI = exp(log_rHR - 1.96*se_rHR),
    rHR_UCI = exp(log_rHR + 1.96*se_rHR)
  )

dat2 %>% select(trial, rHR, rHR_LCI, rHR_UCI)

# 3) 随机效应合并（Gyawali写的是random-effects）
library(metafor)
m_rhr <- rma(yi = log_rHR, sei = se_rHR, method = "DL", data = dat2)  # DL仅作示例
m_rhr

# 4) 输出合并rHR
pooled_rHR <- exp(c(m_rhr$b, m_rhr$ci.lb, m_rhr$ci.ub))
names(pooled_rHR) <- c("pooled_rHR","LCI","UCI")
pooled_rHR

mg1<-metagen(
        TE = log_rHR,
        seTE = se_rHR,
        studlab = `Trial.name`,
        sm = "HR",
        n.e = N_E,
        n.c  = N_C,
        method.tau = "DL",
        hakn = F,
        byvar = masked,
        data = dat2
      )
# 5) 森林图（类似文中 Figure）
forest(mg1, slab = dat2$Trial.name, atransf = exp,
       xlab = "rHR = HR(QoL) / HR(OS)")

m.gen.inf <- InfluenceAnalysis(mg1, random =TRUE)
summary(m.gen.inf)
plot(m.gen.inf,"baujat")
plot(m.gen.inf,"influence")
update(mg1, exclude = c(4,5)) %>% summary()
summary(mg)

```
